text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without warning, several prominent Umamusume
from previous generations come out of hiatus and
rejoin the fierce competition on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dawning of the Ultimate Era sets Eishin Flash
on edge, and she starts making blunders during
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is positive that, at this rate, she won't
be able to keep the promise she made to her
parents to win every race leading up to the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than face the fiery competition in G1
races, she replaces them with G2 and G3 races,
where she is nearly guaranteed to win by default.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fearing that Eishin Flash is setting herself up for
failure, I seek Smart Falcon for advice on how to
get through to her.
